description: Execute V0.7-M3-B by designing the improvement proposal pipeline, the governed self-repair model, review gating/escalation rules, and defining auditability requirements. Must answer the 6 explicit questions from the M3 directive.
scope: Generate a comprehensive design document (tasks/v0.7-m3-b-self-repair-model.md). The document MUST explicitly answer what can happen automatically vs. what requires independent approval, how to prevent silent self-modification, how to ensure auditability, how to prevent rubber-stamp review, and how to distinguish a retry from an escalated problem pattern.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of unapproved self-modification logic. NO rewriting of the governance, review, or gatekeeper mechanisms themselves. NO execution of .agent-state/ migrations or environment adaptations. NO modifying workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to implement actual automated self-repair scripts.
Executing without an approved M3-B contract.
